Off Calendar Mar-13-2013 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #12, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Jan-15-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Richard Wall for Carol Williamson (Trustee). Mary Munstermann (Heir) was also present.

Mr. Wall stated that the amount each Beneficiary was to receive was very close to the amount indicated ($26,346.00) by the Probate Examiner. The accounting petition was granted (subject to review of the order). The $5,000.00 reserve is approved but is not to be expended on attorney fees without an aplication for approval of fees.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead.

Petition For Removal Of Unsupervised Trust Form Continuing Court Supervision, Waiver Of Accounting
Off Calendar Jul-02-2007 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Richard Wall appearing for Carol Williamson. Ms. Williamson is not in Court because she is hospitalized. Counsel stated 17250 is not applicable but 17218 is. Court has problem removing the trust from court supervision unless ther is a conservatorship establish for Leonard Munstermann. Counsel produced a letter from the Reginal Center. Matter submitted. Court is inclined not to grant it.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Gena Eales CSR# 9176. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Rob Harris.
